commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Yea, also I continued in the work of this wall, neither bought we any land: and all my servants were gathered there unto the work. Wall, pleading no exemption, but making my servants work. (Calmet) Though no particular portion was assigned to him, he helped all. (Tirinus) No land, as I might have done, on advantageous terms. (Haydock) Rare example of disinterestedness. He praises himself without vanity, only to induce others to follow the same course. So Moses, David, St. Paul, and others acted, Numbers xii.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
